ads.title: Vintage Eagle Two In One Cocktail Arcade Cabinet
ads.description: Vintage cocktail-style arcade cabinet with a wooden exterior and glass top. This unit has a built-in CRT monitor and internal electronic components including a power supply and circuit boards. The control panel features a joystick and multiple push buttons. It includes original Japanese instruction labels and diagrams. Project Selling a vintage Japanese arcade cabinet believed to be an original Nichibutsu (Japanese manufacturer) machine. Cabinet appears complete with original CRT monitor, wiring, boards, and Japanese instruction sheet still inside. This is an older import cabinet and is being sold as-is. I have not fully tested it, so consider it a restoration or collector project. The cabinet is in original condition and would make a great addition for an arcade collector, vintage gaming enthusiast, or restoration hobbyist. Features:• Original CRT monitor• Original arcade boards and wiring• Japanese documentation included• Rare vintage Japanese import cabinet• Sold as-is These older Japanese cabinets are getting harder to find, especially in largely original condition. Asking $900 OBO.
